task_objective: Fix autosync status strip display during game run and exit by adding a BrowserView-backed overlay surface.
tests_added: Added a frontend static regression test requiring BrowserView creation, data URL rendering, bounds updates, visibility updates, publisher wiring, and dismount cleanup.
design_decisions: Kept the React DOM strip as a fallback but made BrowserView the primary visible overlay surface.
Used GamepadUIMainWindowInstance.CreateBrowserView when available, with SteamClient.BrowserView.Create as a fallback.
Loaded a self-contained data URL instead of adding a separate asset or backend endpoint.
Destroyed the BrowserView on plugin dismount to avoid leaving an orphan overlay.
results: Targeted frontend static tests, TypeScript typecheck, Rollup build, Ruff, ty, and the full pytest suite passed.
